summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: unit right triangle with YELLOW dashed hypotenuse (√2 ≈ 1.414). ValueTracker N_tr steps N = 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32; always_redraw RED staircase along the hypotenuse with N rectangular steps. Staircase perimeter stays = 2 regardless of N — showing lim perimeter ≠ perimeter of lim.
